info.title: Document-Generator Service
info.description:
This Service is use to convert HTML Templates into PDF files.

 **Last update**: 08 ene 26, 10:45 a. m.

tags.name: Template
tags.description: For generate HTML's Templates, to use to generate Documents

tags.name: Document
tags.description: For generate HTML and PDF documents, store it, and be ready to download it

tags.name: Document files
tags.description: For generate PDF files from HTML templates on demand

pdfLink.description: Temporally link to download the document

requestBody.description: The documents to delete. You can use documentId and/or customFields to find documents to remove.

statusCode.description: The status code of the request

post.description:
This API received a **HTML Template** (and its variable's values) and generate a **PDF** file.

It starts the process to create a **PDF document**, when the creation is completed, the API returns a response with the PDF link to download.

pdfLink.description: Temporally link to download the document

post.description: This API allows to create different templates, using **HTML** code for services and entities.

put.description:
**IMPORTANT**: If `html`, `format` or `formatOptions` fields are updated, `canBeUpdated` property will 
be saved as **false** regardless of whether in the same request is sent as **true**

post.description:
This API received a **HTML Template** (and its variable's values) and generate several **HTML** documents.

It starts the process to create **PDF documents**, when it finish to create the PDF, the service emits an event (**not ready yet**).

200.description: Retry to generate the document was successfully executed

id.name: id

TemplateFilters.name: filters

DocumentFilters.name: filters
DocumentFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

customFields.description:
Filter for additional information provided by the service.

- `property name *` : The field-name
- `value`: the extra information

**IMPORTANT**, example of use by query string:

`api/document?filters[customFields][invoiceNumber]=0010023`

dateCreated.description:
Range of the document's date of creation.

**IMPORTANT**, example of use by query string:

`api/document?filters[dateCreated][from]=2021-08-19T03%3A00%3A00.000Z&filters[dateCreated][to]=2021-08-27T03%3A00%3A00.000Z`

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

templateService.description: The `code` of the service that makes the request. This refer to the `code` of the **Service** Entity. See [Service](/v2/service/devops#tag/service).

templateEntity.description: The name of the entities that the template would use.

templateCode.description: The unique code of the template. This code is unique per service.

templateHtml.description: The HTML code to be used as a template.

templateFormat.description: The format for the PDF Page's size. If `Custom` is choose it required `formatOptions`

typeFormat.description: The type format of the template

DefaultTemplate.description: The template is the design that the PDF file will have when it is created.

template.description: The template that will be compiled
The template that will be compiled

RenderData.description:
The data which will be used to replace in the template

If you need to send a property of type **QR** the name of the same has to start with `qr_`

If you need to send a property of type **Barcode128** the name of the same has to start with `barcode128_`

Template.description: The template is the design that the PDF file will have when it is created.

canBeUpdated.description: The indicator of whether the template can be updated automatically, if it is not provided is saved as `true`.

BaseDocument.description: Document formatted with the URL to get the PDF document.

service.description: Service `code` that will be use the document

entity.description: The entity used to required the **PDF** document file

customFields.description: Additional information provided by the service to identify a particular document

templateCode.description: The Template `code`. This refer to the `code` of the **Template** Entity. See [Template](/v2/service/document-generator#tag/Template).

templateId.description: The Template ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Template** Entity. See [Template](/v2/service/document-generator#tag/Template).

item.description: The variables used for generate the **HTML** and **PDF** documents

example.title: Zega Company,
example.message: Congratulations for buying our product. Enjoy It!!,
example.name: John Doe,

errorMessage.description: This error message appears only when the status is equal to **uploadedError** or **generatedError**
errorMessage.example: Cannot create the pdf. Error: reason

pdfLink.description: Generate a temporally link to download the document

DocumentTemplate.description: A document template to create PDFs

template.description:
The **HTML template**, it must contains variables to generate the **HTML** and **PDFs** files.

It uses *Handlebar's* format for the variables. See [Handlebars](https://handlebarsjs.com/guide/#simple-expressions).

templateCode.description:
The Template `code`. This refer to the `code` of the **Template** Entity. See [Template](/v2/service/document-generator#tag/Template).

**IMPORTANT** :  If this field is sent, the `template` field will be ignored, and use **Template** `html` field.

mergeDocuments.description: Indicates if the `items` must be merged into a single Document. For `Document Create API` if it false will be create individual documents, for `Document-File Create API` always create a single Document.

service.description: Service `code` that will be use the document. **If it isn't sent, the session will be used to add it**

urlExpires.description:
Expiration time in seconds used to generate the public URL of the files.

> In case the expiration time is not passed, it will be 15 minutes (900 seconds).
>
> The maximum expiration time allowed cannot exceed 7 days (604800 seconds).

example.title: Zega Company
example.message: Congratulations for buying our product. Enjoy It!!
example.name: John Doe

ItemsUrlToCreate.description:
An URL where a file with the items are hosted.

* The file must be a JSON, with the structure of `items` field (of this API body request).
* It can be use in cases where needs to pass a massive amount of items, and the basic payload is not enough.

If `itemsUrl` is sent, `items` is not required, and has priority over `items`, otherwise `items` is required.

ItemsToCreate.description: List of document's variables. **Every item in the list will generate 1 HTML and 1 PDF file**. * `property name*`: variable's names. * `qr_[NAME]`: _string_ or _object_. The data in this fields will be transform to a **QR Code** Image. * Change `[NAME]` for something thats represents the QR * **Recommend**: `` to render property * **Example**: * `qr_fizzmod: 'https://fizzmod.com/'` * `` * `barcode128_[NAME]`: _string_. The data in this fields will be transform to a **Barcode 128** Image. * Change `[NAME]` for something thats represents the Barcode * **Recommend**: `` to render property * **Example**: * `barcode128_positionKey: '10.A.AB'` * `` **IMPORTANT** : In order to provide additional information that can be used for identify a particular document, you can add `customFields` as an extra `property name*`. `customFields`: _object_
